title: IAddIn Object
description: The interface implemented by an add-in.

methods.name: onActivate
methods.description: Lets the application do any initialization when it is safe to do so.

methods.name: onDeactivate
methods.description: Lets the application do any termination when it is safe to do so. In general, if the add-in is closing, termination should be minimized.

onActivate.title: IAddIn.onActivate Method
onActivate.description: Lets the application do any initialization when it is safe to do so.

onDeactivate.title: IAddIn.onDeactivate Method
onDeactivate.description: Lets the application do any termination when it is safe to do so. In general, if the add-in is closing, termination should be minimized.
